zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势下行趋势延续
zh.content:
从当前价格表现来看，AVAX/USD报6.7078，24小时下跌1.49%，价格持续运行于20日均线7.0461下方，表明中短期空头仍占据主导。日内高低点区间逐步下移，市场整体维持弱势震荡偏空格局，趋势尚未出现明显反转信号。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为-0.2081，处于零轴下方，显示空头动能仍然存在。虽然RSI数据暂缺，但结合均线压制及MACD负值判断，市场情绪偏谨慎。若后续MACD柱体持续收窄，则需关注空头动能减弱带来的阶段性反弹机会。

关键位置方面，短线支撑位关注6.63附近，即日内低点区域；若跌破该位置，可能进一步测试6.50整数关口。上方首要阻力位位于6.85附近，其次为20日均线所在的7.05区域，只有有效站稳该位置，才有望改善当前弱势结构。

交易策略上，短线投资者宜以反弹做空思路为主，避免在弱势环境中盲目追涨。激进交易者可关注6.63支撑附近的企稳信号进行低吸博弈，但需严格设置止损。稳健投资者建议等待价格重新突破并站稳7.05后，再考虑顺势布局多单。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD remains in a clear short-term downtrend, with the current price at 6.7078 trading below the 20-period simple moving average of 7.0461. This positioning suggests that sellers continue to control market direction, while the 24-hour decline of 1.49% reinforces ongoing bearish sentiment. The inability to sustain movement above the moving average indicates weak buying pressure and highlights the broader challenge for bulls attempting to reverse momentum.

Momentum indicators also favor a cautious outlook. The MACD reading of -0.2081 remains in negative territory, signaling persistent downside momentum and confirming the prevailing bearish structure. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value alone suggests that bearish forces remain dominant. The absence of an RSI reading limits confirmation of oversold or overbought conditions, making price action and trend-following indicators more important in assessing near-term direction.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the recent 24-hour low at 6.6344. A decisive break below this level could expose AVAX to additional selling pressure and potentially trigger a move toward lower psychological support zones around 6.50. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 6.85, corresponding to the recent intraday high, while stronger resistance is clustered around the SMA(20) near 7.05. A sustained recovery above these levels would be needed to improve the short-term technical outlook.

Traders may prefer a defensive approach while price remains below the 20-period moving average. Conservative participants could wait for confirmation of a breakout above 6.85 and ultimately 7.05 before considering stronger bullish positions. Short-term traders may continue to favor selling rallies into resistance, provided bearish momentum persists. Risk management remains essential, as a rebound from the 6.63 support region could trigger increased volatility and a temporary shift in market sentiment.
